---
title: Benson Plateau report
author: drm
url: "https://www.oregonhikers.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=26780"
code_source: "https://github.com/agi-otw/dcd_pipeline"
---

I went up Herman, Herman Bridge, and the PCT to camp juse below Teakettle Springs. From there I did a loop up the PCT, right on Benson Way to Hunters Camp, left on Ruckel Creek to the PCT and back to camp. The best report is that Hunters Camp is completely untouched and the part of Benson Way I was on was mostly green. Benson Way has always been faint and it stil is but it is not really any worse. The few places where the trail disappears, just look 30 feet ahead.  

Also: bugs are out in force up there. And: Teakellte Springs was in sad shape. Just a trickle and the main pool was very muddle. I dug out a lower pool for clear water, but it will probably fill again.  

Sign at the trailhead, we are going to have to get used to these

The trailhead - looks normal so far!

Just above the powerline road, some moss has been burned off this rock

Herman Creek - the fire didn't get to the bottom of the canyon

I wonder if this spot-burned tree was already dead?

Ground cover gone, lower tree singed, but tree crowns were still green
